rationale.R1.2: The section contains circular forward/backward references ('we showed earlier'), tense inconsistencies ('were relaxed' vs. present tense elsewhere), and an informal convergence argument whose conditions (convexity, concavity) are flagged as not fully satisfied — logical coherence of the technical narrative is a plausible primary concern.
